# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading ContosoUniversity from .NET Framework 4.8 (ASP.NET MVC 5) to .NET 10 (ASP.NET Core MVC) using All-at-Once strategy with in-place rewrite.

**Progress**: 3/4 tasks complete <progress value="75" max="100"></progress> 75%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-prerequisites: Verify SDK and toolchain readiness ([Content](tasks/01-prerequisites/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-prerequisites/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 02-sdk-style-conversion: Convert project to SDK-style format ([Content](tasks/02-sdk-style-conversion/task.md), [Progress](tasks/02-sdk-style-conversion/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 03-migrate-to-aspnet-core: Migrate from ASP.NET MVC 5 to ASP.NET Core on .NET 10 ([Content](tasks/03-migrate-to-aspnet-core/task.md), [Progress](tasks/03-migrate-to-aspnet-core/progress-details.md))
- 🔲 04-final-validation: Validate build and clean up
